327 GG0170B1_SIT_LYNG_STRT_CD GG0170B1_SIT_LYNG_STRT_CD GG0170B1 Admission Performance Sit to Lying Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to go from a sitting position on the side of bed to lying flat on the bed, at the time of admission.
